baselines.name: OWASP Web Security Testing Guide 4.2 scenarios
baselines.applicability: Select every scenario relevant to an observed or declared surface; record not-applicable with a reason for explicitly reviewed exclusions.

baselines.name: OWASP Application Security Verification Standard 5.0.0 requirements
baselines.applicability: Choose the authorized assurance level and record every selected requirement as tested, exhausted, blocked, not-applicable, or not-tested with evidence or reason.
